title: matelea corrugata
intro: Matelea corrugata, also known as the corrugated matelea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Matelea corrugata has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas or infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits including reducing fever and promoting relaxation.
